sidebar_desc.0:
### Create Project
Design applications from scratch. Set unique identities, versions, and metadata for the **Influent OS** ecosystem with guided steps.
sidebar_desc.1:
### Build Package
Package your work. Turn development folders into compressed `.iflapp` files ready for global distribution.
sidebar_desc.2:
### Application Manager
Your control center. Manage local projects and installed apps. Run, debug, or remove with precision.
sidebar_desc.3:
### Settings
Tune the program engine. Control paths, language, appearance, and options stored in data/pm.data.
sidebar_desc.4:
### MoonFix Suite
Deep repair. Scan, detect, and fix inconsistencies in your packages. Ensure every asset and XML tag is correct.
sidebar_desc.5:
### About
Technical project details. GPL license, Qt framework, and the team behind **Package Maker**.

config.title: Settings
config.auto_translate: Automatic translation when text is missing
config.auto_translate_hint: Uses online translation and saves results to data/pm.data.
config.locked_hint: Locked in compiled build. Customize before building the executable.
config.personalization_hint: Does not change the window title or company name (Influent).
config.saved_restart: Saved. Some changes require restarting the application.
config.dpi_restart_hint: Full DPI scaling is applied after restart.
config.reset_confirm: Are you sure you want to reset settings to default values?
